description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style screwdriver with a distinctive T-handle design, featuring a thick, cylindrical shaft in a tan or brass color. The handle is black with yellow accents and has two extended arms capped with pointed metallic ends, suggesting additional leverage or multi-functionality. A red wire or cord is attached to one side of the handle, possibly for hanging or electrical grounding. The main shaft tapers to a metallic, pointed tip, which appears to be a flathead type. The overall construction suggests a heavy-duty tool, likely used for demanding urban or construction tasks. The surfaces are smooth and hard, with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A heavy-duty T-handle screwdriver with a tan shaft, black handle, and pointed flathead tip, featuring side arms and a red cord. The tool appears robust and suitable for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick tan shaft, black handle, and the pointed tip, with the side arms mostly hidden.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full T-handle with extended arms, pointed metallic ends, and the attached red cord.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the shaft and handle, with the red cord attachment more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again displays the T-handle arms, pointed ends, and the red cord, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: T-handle, straight, black plastic with yellow accents, ergonomic for two-handed grip
